name: UTERINE RUPTURE IN PREGNANCY
definition: disruption of all layers surrounding the fetus (membranes, decidua, myometrium, serosa)

demographics.Prevalence: 3-5% for classic cesarean sections; 1-2% for lower segment operations; 1% of

discriminating_features: extrusion of fetus into the abdomen

general: extrusion of fetus into the abdomen

clinical.Cx: hypofibrinogenemia (triggered by excessive blood loss, trauma, amniotic fluid embolism)
